CavetNoticeRecord.description: A single caveat / warning-note (הערת אזהרה) or restrictive-note registration.

registration_type.description: The specific type of registration allowed.
registration_type.title: Registration Type

beneficiary.description: Beneficiary name as it appears in the Tabu. Leave null if unclear.
beneficiary.title: Beneficiary

registration_date.description: Registration date as in the Tabu
registration_date.title: Registration Date

verbatim_quote.description: Mandatory verbatim snippet proving this caveat registration
verbatim_quote.title: Verbatim Quote

CavetNoticeRecord.title: CavetNoticeRecord

EvidentiaryReference.description:
אסמכתא ראייתית — mandatory structured evidence: source document, page, verbatim quote.

Every Finding and every TimelineEvent is backed by at least one such reference.
Used in extractors and in the report; report-level SourceRef adds locator fields.

source_document_name.description: שם מסמך מקור — name of the source document
source_document_name.title: Source Document Name

verbatim_quote.description: ציטוט מדויק — exact verbatim quote from the document
verbatim_quote.title: Verbatim Quote

EvidentiaryReference.title: EvidentiaryReference

ExtractorTimelineEvent.description: Dated event with Evidentiary Reference. Synthesis maps to TimelineEvent (SourceRef).

date.description: Date of the event in YYYY-MM-DD format
date.title: Date

event_description_he.description: Description of the event in Hebrew
event_description_he.title: Event Description He

ExtractorTimelineEvent.title: ExtractorTimelineEvent

MortgageRecord.description: A single mortgage registration from the Tabu.

registration_type.description: Label as it appears, e.g. "משכנתא", "הערת אזהרה לרישום משכנתה"
registration_type.title: Registration Type

bank_or_lender.description: Bank / lending institution name as it appears in the Tabu
bank_or_lender.title: Bank Or Lender

registration_date.description: Registration date as in the Tabu
registration_date.title: Registration Date

verbatim_quote.description: Mandatory verbatim snippet proving this mortgage registration
verbatim_quote.title: Verbatim Quote

MortgageRecord.title: MortgageRecord

RightsHolder.description: A single registered owner / rights holder from the Tabu ownership section.

name.description: Owner name exactly as registered in the Tabu
name.title: Name

ownership_share.description: Ownership share as it appears in the Tabu
ownership_share.title: Ownership Share

acquisition_type.description: Acquisition type as it appears in the Tabu. Example: מכר, צוואה, ירושה
acquisition_type.title: Acquisition Type

verbatim_quote.description: Mandatory verbatim snippet from the Tabu proving this entry
verbatim_quote.title: Verbatim Quote

RightsHolder.title: RightsHolder

SubParcelExtraction.description: All extracted data for a single sub-parcel from the Tabu body.

rights_holders.description: Registered owners from the ownership section (בעלויות)
rights_holders.title: Rights Holders

notes_excluded_transfer_to_foreigners.description: True if a 'transfer to foreigners' note was found but excluded from caveats
notes_excluded_transfer_to_foreigners.title: Notes Excluded Transfer To Foreigners

SubParcelExtraction.title: SubParcelExtraction

description:
Structured output of the Tabu-extract agent.

Combines three extraction domains into a single per-sub-parcel structure:
1. Non-mortgage encumbrances (caveats, restrictive notes)
2. Mortgage registrations
3. Registered owners / rights holders

The body of the Tabu extract is authoritative for sub-parcel identification.
Header/title counts are ignored.

address.description: Full property address as it appears in the Tabu
address.title: Address

sub_parcels.description: One entry per sub-parcel found in the Tabu body
sub_parcels.title: Sub Parcels

title: TabuExtraction
